migrations.title: OpenClaw Gateway Config v2
migrations.description: Channel plugin config restructured for multi-provider support.

steps.title: Channel config
steps.description: Channels now use nested plugin config
steps.after:
channels:
  telegram:
    plugin: telegram
    config:
      token: xxx
steps.notes: All channel definitions need the plugin key

steps.title: Model aliases
steps.description: Model aliases moved to top-level models section
steps.notes: Old format still works but deprecated
